message: fix: allow legacy skill fields in schema

   ownerUserId: v.id('users'),
   canonicalSkillId: v.optional(v.id('skills')),
   forkOf: v.optional(

   tags: v.record(v.string(), v.id('skillVersions')),
   softDeletedAt: v.optional(v.number()),
